//: ONE-CLICK INSTALL. Commit this as <your-project>/.claude/settings.json (merge if it exists). Anyone who opens the project in Claude Code (CLI, desktop app, or IDE extension) is prompted once to trust the folder + install the marketplace; the delivery-team plugin is then auto-enabled with NO /plugin commands. Commands appear namespaced as /delivery-team:deliver and /delivery-team:self-review.
